item.title: Publications
item.author: yyang@roma2.infn.it (Yu-Han Yang)
item.description:
My publications can also be accessed through /

First-Author
#

  1. Yu-Han Yang, Eleonora Troja, Brendan O’Connor, et al., Nature, 626, 742–745 (2024). ADS: 2024Natur.626..742Y, DOI: 10.1038/s41586-023-06979-5

item.title: GCNs
item.author: yyang@roma2.infn.it (Yu-Han Yang)
item.description:
The General Coordinates Network (GCN) is a public collaboration platform run by NASA for the astronomy research community to share alerts and rapid communications about high-energy, multimessenger, and transient phenomena.

Below are some of the GCN circulars that include my contributions.
